# Cape Verde Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Cape Verde's administrative hierarchy:
> 22 municipalitys, 32 parishs.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total municipalitys: 22
- Total parishs: 32
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-01
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All municipalitys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-municipality.json)
- [All parishs (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-parish.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Municipality

- [Boa Vista](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/boa-vista-cv01/) — 2 parishs

- [Maio](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/maio-cv03/) — 1 parishs
- [Mosteiros](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mosteiros-cv04/) — 1 parishs
- [Paul](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/paul-cv05/) — 1 parishs
- [Porto Novo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/porto-novo-cv06/) — 2 parishs

- [Ribeira Brava](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ribeira-brava-cv08/) — 2 parishs
- [Ribeira Grande](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ribeira-grande-cv09/) — 4 parishs
- [Ribeira Grande de Santiago](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ribeira-grande-de-santiago-cv10/) — 2 parishs
- [Sal](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sal-cv11/) — 1 parishs
- [Santa Catarina](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/santa-catarina-cv12/) — 1 parishs
- [Santa Catarina do Fogo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/santa-catarina-do-fogo-cv13/) — 1 parishs
- [Santa Cruz](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/santa-cruz-cv14/) — 1 parishs
- [Sao Domingos](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-domingos-cv15/) — 2 parishs
- [Sao Filipe](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-filipe-cv16/) — 2 parishs
- [Sao Lourenco dos Orgaos](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-lourenco-dos-orgaos-cv17/) — 1 parishs
- [Sao Miguel](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-miguel-cv18/) — 1 parishs
- [Sao Salvador do Mundo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-salvador-do-mundo-cv19/) — 1 parishs
- [Sao Vicente](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sao-vicente-cv20/) — 1 parishs
- [Tarrafal](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tarrafal-cv21/) — 1 parishs
- [Tarrafal de Sao Nicolau](https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tarrafal-de-sao-nicolau-cv22/) — 1 parishs

- [Santa Catarina](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/santa-catarina-cv12.txt)

- [Santa Cruz](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/santa-cruz-cv14.txt)
- [Sao Domingos](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sao-domingos-cv15.txt)

- [Sao Lourenco dos Orgaos](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sao-lourenco-dos-orgaos-cv17.txt)
- [Sao Miguel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sao-miguel-cv18.txt)
- [Sao Salvador do Mundo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sao-salvador-do-mundo-cv19.txt)
- [Sao Vicente](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sao-vicente-cv20.txt)
- [Tarrafal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tarrafal-cv21.txt)
- [Tarrafal de Sao Nicolau](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tarrafal-de-sao-nicolau-cv22.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (municipality), 2 (parish)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Cape Verde Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/cape-verde-administrative-divisions
